title: Cod Mod
description: Cod Mod adds some incredibly random things to the game, Mostly intended for use on The Broken Script SMP server.
body:
# Cod Mod!
Originally this mod was only to contain one item - the Cod Rod - which is the most powerful weapon ever created. However, it has SIGNIFICANTLY expanded since then to now include multiple user submitted weapons, some insane events, computercraft peripherals, new dimensions, a WIP technical section with new machines, and much much more. This mod isn't necessarily intended for use outside of The Broken Script SMP but it will still be fully functional. 

Note: The mod exposes an API server (port 15017) that simply lists banned players, a config option to disable this will be added later.
